description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu spent 14 hrs 23 mins coding, with a daily average of 2 hrs 48 mins. His time was split across 5 projects, mostly in Other (42%) and Java (30%), with additional work in Markdown (13%) and TypeScript (8%). There were no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories recorded for the week.
